29th July, 2013 so, 2310(E)-.Рђћ Whereas the Gentral Government, in exercise of the powers conferred by subРђћsections (1) and (2) of section 14 of the InterРђћ State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 15156), constituted the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal for verification and adjudication of certain matters of_ the-Punjab Settlement, referred therein, vide notification of the Government of India in the M'nis'try of Water Resources, number S.O.169(E), dated the 2"d April, 1986, and the said T1 ibunal forwarded its report to the Central Government on the 30th January, 1987; And whereas, further references have been made by the Central Government to the said T1 ibunal on the 19th August, 1987, requiring explanation and guidance on the report aforesaid, in te Рђўms )fsub-section(3) of whereas, considering the enormous exercise undertaken by the said Tribunal in completing its further report, the Central Government extended from time to time the period of making the said report, till the 5th August, 2013; And whereas, the Central Government, keeping in view the exigencies of the work involved, aspointed out by the said Tribunal, considers it necessary to extend the said period for one year after the 5th August, 2013; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of section 5 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956), the Central Government hereby further extends the period, within which the said Tribunal may forward its report on the references so made, to the Central Government till the 5th day of August, 2014, and for that purpose, makesРђўthe following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Water Resources, number S.O.905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, namely:- 2013 In the said notification, in the last paragraph, for the words, figures and letters Рђюtill the 5th day of August, 2013РђЮ, the words, figures and letters Рђюtill the 5th day of August, 2014РђЮ shall be ' substituted. [F. No. 15/3/2013РђћBM] URVILLA KHATI, Jt. Secy. (PP) Note : The principal notification constituting the Ravi and Beas Waters Tribunal was published in the Gazette of India vide number 8.0.. 169(E), dated the 2nd April, 1986 and subsequently amended vide number 5.0. 666(E), dated the 10th June, 2003; and the period within which the Tribunal was required to forward its further report to the Central Government was extended from time to time vide number 8.0. 905(E), dated the 5th August, 2003, 8.0. 889(E), dated the 5th August, 2004, 8.0. 166(E), dated the 4th February, 2005, 8.0. 1093(E), dated the 4th August, 2005, 8.0. 133(E), dated the 3rd February, 2006, 8.0. 1218(E), dated the 28th July, 2006, 5.0. 104(E), dated the 2nd February, 2007, 8.0. 1112(E), dated the 6th July, 2007, 8.0. 212(E), dated the 30th January, 2008, 8.0. 1700(E), dated the 16th July, 2008, 8.0., 397(E), dated the 4th February, 2009; S.O._ 1812(E), dated the 23rd July, 2009, 8.0. 203(E), dated the 29m -- 3 of 4 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [PART 11Рђћ SEC. 3(ii)| January, 2010, 8.0. 1920(E), dated the 5th August, 2010, 8.0. 250(E), dated the 4th Рђў February, 2011, 5.0. 1803 (13), dated the 5'h August, 2011, 3.0. 216(E), datedРђўthe 3rd February, 2012, 8.0. 1736 (E), dated the 3rd August, 2012' and 8.0. 317 (E) dated the sРђўlFebruary, 2013.
